description_long: This research institute is a large, multi-story building with a predominantly rectangular form and a modern architectural style. The exterior is clad in reddish-brown brick, with extensive glass window panels running horizontally across the main facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure features a stepped design, with certain sections protruding or receding, and a green rooftop terrace area visible on one side. The ground level includes a glass-fronted lobby or entrance area, set back from the street and accessible via a paved walkway. The building is surrounded by paved sidewalks, landscaped green patches, and adjacent roadways, indicating its integration into an urban environment. The overall impression is of a robust, institutional facility designed for research and academic purposes.
description: A large, modern research institute with a brick facade, extensive glass windows, and a stepped, multi-level design. Features include a prominent glass entryway, rooftop terrace, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with a wide glass entryway, horizontal window bands, and a landscaped area along the base.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the building's narrow profile, stepped sections, and the green rooftop terrace extending along one side.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the solid brick wall with vertical window slits and a curved landscaped section at the base.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the building's vertical window arrangements, curved lower section, and the integration of green space along the perimeter.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is a wide, glass-fronted section at the base of the building, featuring large transparent panels and double doors. It is set back from the street, accessible via a paved walkway, and flanked by landscaped green areas. The entry is at ground level, with no visible steps, suggesting accessibility for all users.
